description:
In higher_order, when a function-typed argument is passed as a known callee at some callsites and unknown at others, only a generic (wide) spec is generated covering all sites. A separate narrow spec for the known-callee callsites is missing.

The specializer should detect that some callsites resolve to a concrete function and emit a narrow spec for those, keeping the wide spec for fully polymorphic callsites.
title: higher_order: generic and narrow spec coexistence — narrow spec not generated for known-callee sites
